releaseNotes:
Release v0.1.19

New Features:
- Redesign enterprise add-user flow via Paddle checkout (PS-85)
- Add Manage Subscription button for enterprise users
- Add customer portal link support for enterprise users
- Add AdminDataContext for shared cached state in enterprise admin

Bug Fixes:
- Fix atomic session handling and sandbox UX improvements (PS-85)
- Handle checkout_pending users in removeEnterpriseUser
- Guard against missing orgId in createEnterpriseUserCheckoutSession
- Fix typo in checkout session URL
- Make paddle_subscription_id optional in EnterpriseUser

Improvements:
- Improve keyring error logging — missing secret keys and failed API token generation now surface as actionable error messages in the console
